title: Grafana 12 — Upgrade Overview
description: Single-pane landing page for the v12 demo suite. Links to every feature dashboard and shows version + health of the underlying lab.

options.content:
## 🎤 Enterprise presentation dashboards (share these)

- ✨ **[Grafana 12 — What's New (Enterprise Showcase)](/d/v12-enterprise-whats-new)** — the slide deck for leadership + users
- ⚠️ **[Grafana 12 — Deprecations & Breaking Changes](/d/v12-enterprise-deprecations)** — the risk + mitigation story

## 🛡 Admin breaking-change dashboards (for the cutover)

- 🔴 [Pre / Post Upgrade Comparison](/d/v12-admin-prepost) — 11.6.4 baseline vs 12.4.3 live, with add/remove diffs
- 🔴 [Migration Readiness Scorecard](/d/v12-admin-readiness)
- 🔴 [Breaking Changes Tracker (30-item playbook)](/d/v12-admin-bct)
- 🔴 [Angular & Plugin Deep Audit](/d/v12-admin-angular)
- 🔴 [Dashboard Schema & Scenes Migration](/d/v12-admin-schema)
- 🔴 [Deprecated UI Panel Inventory](/d/v12-admin-deprecated-panels)
- 🔴 [Deprecated API / Endpoint Scanner](/d/v12-admin-endpoints)
- 🔴 [Cutover Observability](/d/v12-admin-cutover)

## 🎯 Feature demos

### 12.0
- [Drilldown Suite](/d/v12-0-drilldown) · [React Data Grid](/d/v12-0-table) · [SQL Expressions](/d/v12-0-sql-expr) · [Recording Rules](/d/v12-0-recording-rules) · [Scenes Chained Variables](/d/v12-0-scenes-vars) · [Git Sync](/d/v12-0-git-sync)

### 12.1
- [Regression](/d/v12-1-regression) · [Visualization Actions](/d/v12-1-viz-actions) · [New Alert Rule Page](/d/v12-1-alert-rule-page) · [Grafana Advisor](/d/v12-1-advisor)

### 12.2
- [Ad-hoc Filters](/d/v12-2-adhoc) · [Logs JSON Viewer](/d/v12-2-logs-json)

### 12.3
- [Panel Time Drawer](/d/v12-3-time-drawer) · [Switch Variable](/d/v12-3-switch-var) · [Redesigned Logs Panel](/d/v12-3-logs-panel)

### 12.4
- [Multi-property Variables](/d/v12-4-multiprop) · [Regex Variables](/d/v12-4-regex-vars) · [Gauge Styles](/d/v12-4-gauge) · [OTLP Logs](/d/v12-4-otlp) · [HA Alertmanager](/d/v12-4-am-ha) · [Traces Drilldown](/d/v12-4-traces-dd) · [Profiles + Flame Graph](/d/v12-4-profiles-dd) · [Dynamic Dashboards](/d/v12-4-dynamic)

## Drilldown apps (Grafana 12 core)

These replaced Explore Metrics/Logs/Traces and went GA in 12.0:

- [Metrics Drilldown](/a/grafana-metricsdrilldown-app)
- [Logs Drilldown](/a/grafana-lokiexplore-app)
- [Traces Drilldown](/a/grafana-exploretraces-app)
- [Profiles Drilldown](/a/grafana-pyroscope-app)

## Administration

- [Feature toggles](/admin/featuretoggles) — assert every required toggle is on
- [Plugin catalog](/plugins) — 12.0 revamped install flow
- [Grafana Advisor](/a/grafana-advisor-app) — 12.1 plugin/DS/SSO checks
- [Alert rule page](/alerting/new/alerting) — 12.1 GA
- [Dashboards](/dashboards) — browse all

## Source of truth

This lab targets the canonical pins and features documented in `docs/01-breaking-changes-matrix.md` (30-item playbook). Any toggle or breaking change referenced there has a live validator in `validation/gate.py`.
